reasoning: For the first resolution date (Dec 14), FIDE publishes rankings monthly, and the December 2025 list is already out (where Batsiashvili is #20). Wikipedia's table updates monthly, meaning her ranking will not change by Dec 14. For the subsequent dates (Jan 6 and Mar 7), new FIDE lists will be published and Wikipedia will update. She is currently exactly on the edge of the Top 20 (rank #20). Being on the boundary, she is highly vulnerable to dropping out of the top 20 if any player currently below her has a good tournament, or if she loses rating points. Therefore, her probability of maintaining a rank of 20 or better drops to roughly slightly below 50% for January, and slightly lower for March as variance in player performances increases over time.
